criteria.label: State and apply the posterior updating identity
criteria.example: Given P(θ), P(x|θ), compute unnormalized P(θ|x) for a discrete θ grid and normalize for a coin-flip dataset.

criteria.label: Perform a conjugate Beta–Bernoulli update by hand
criteria.example: Prior Beta(3,7), observe 5 heads in 8 flips; write posterior Beta(8,10) and give its mean.

criteria.label: Explain how a prior strength affects posterior with sparse data
criteria.example: Compare posterior means for Beta(1,1) vs Beta(50,50) after 4/6 heads and describe which is more data-driven.

criteria.label: Connect Ridge regression to a Gaussian prior on coefficients
criteria.example: Write the MAP objective for linear regression with N(0,τ²) priors on β and identify the Ridge λ term.

criteria.label: Diagnose a base-rate neglect error using priors
criteria.example: Given prevalence 0.1% and test accuracy 99%, compute P(diseased|+) and explain why it stays below 50%.
